nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 草原松鸡
nodes.summary: 草原松鸡（Greater prairie-chicken，学名 Tympanuchus cupido），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 雉科
nodes.summary: 雉科（Phasianidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联179种鸟类，如Udzungwa forest partridge、銹紅林鷓鴣、冠鷓鴣等179种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联210种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等210种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This North American species was once abundant but has become extremely rare or extirpated over much of its range due to habitat loss, natural disasters, and overhunting. Conservation measures are underway to ensure the sustainability of existing small populations

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |title=Steam-boating on the Ohio and Mississippi Before the Civil War |url=https://scholarworks.iu.edu/journals/index.php/imh/article/view/5927 |journal=Indiana Magazine of History |publisher=Indiana University Press |volume=XI |issue=2 |pages=99–127 |issn=0019-6673 |jstor=27785676 |oclc=61313105 |jstor-access=free}} The greater prairie-chicken was almost extinct in the 1930s due to hunting pressure and habitat loss
